title: Rain Water Trapped
hints: Use prefix and suffix maximum arrays.
For each position i, the water trapped depends on the minimum of maximum height on left and maximum height on right.
Create left maximum array: l[i] = max height from index 0 to i.
Create right maximum array: r[i] = max height from index i to n-1.
For each position i (from 1 to n-2), trapped water = min(l[i-1], r[i+1]) - A[i] if positive.
